title: Professional Cake Leveller Cutter 10 Inch Adjustable Stainless Steel Wire Cake Slicer Cutter,Cake Slicer Cutter Divider,Leveller Cutter for Kitchen Accessories Baking Tools (27CM Purple)
features: Perfect for Even Cake Layers：This cake leveler helps you create flat, even cake layers with ease, making it an essential tool for any baker. Measuring approximately 27*16cm, it’s designed to meet all your baking needs, ensuring professional-level results every time.

Ergonomic & Easy to Use：Featuring flat feet for stability and a non-slip ergonomic handle, this cake leveller offers effortless control while slicing. It’s designed to stand firmly and slide smoothly on your counter, ensuring every cut is precise and stable.

Premium Stainless Steel Construction：Crafted from high-quality 304 stainless steel, this cake slicer boasts exceptional cutting performance. Rust-proof, durable, and easy to clean, it maintains its sharpness and cutting effectiveness for long-term use, making it a reliable addition to your baking toolkit.

Non-Slip Grip for Safety & Comfort：Equipped with a non-slip handle, this cake leveler provides a stable grip for safer operation. The ergonomic handle ensures comfort during use, preventing slipping or sliding, so you can cut cakes with ease and confidence.

Versatile Baking Tool：Not just for cakes, this multifunctional tool can be used to cut a wide variety of baked goods such as bread, cake rolls, cookies, pastries, brownies, pies, and more. Whether you’re an amateur baker or a professional chef, this cake cutter is a must-have for your kitchen.
